text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
166 
OTC_UM_PROGRAM 
LABEL: 
Part D Plan Covers Over-the-Counter (OTC) Medications under the Utilization Management Program 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the Part D plan pays for Over-the-Counter medications (OTCs) under 
its Utilization Management (UM) Program. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 
N = No 
COMMENT: 
Plans
